## Your signature

**Location** (optional):

---

## The pledge

By submitting this issue, I confirm that I have read the [Abundance Manifesto](../../MANIFESTO.md) and commit, in my work and community, to the five principles:

- [ ] Radical Openness — prefer open-source tools; share what I create under open licenses
- [ ] Design Global, Make Local — support distributed manufacturing and local production
- [ ] Regenerative Circularity — refuse waste, prioritize repair, design for generations
- [ ] Cooperative Stewardship — favor platforms owned and governed by workers and users
- [ ] Access Over Ownership — contribute to shared infrastructure; measure wealth by what I can use with others

---

*A maintainer will add your name to [SIGNATORIES.md](../../SIGNATORIES.md). If you're comfortable with GitHub, opening a [Pull Request](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) is faster and gives you a permanent commit in the project history.*
